items.title: Nigeria charges six people with treason over Independence Day coup plot
items.dek: Allegations of a coup plot first surfaced in October 2025 when an Independence Day parade was cancelled.
items.body: Allegations of a coup plot first surfaced in October 2025 when an Independence Day parade was cancelled.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Mass trial for 486 alleged MS-13 gang leaders begins in El Salvador
items.dek: The group are collectively accused of committing more than 47,000 crimes, including murder.
items.body: The group are collectively accused of committing more than 47,000 crimes, including murder.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Unprecedented ruling finds Hungary's anti-LGBTQ laws in breach of EU values
items.dek: The EU's top court finds that the reforms breached EU values on a number of levels and broke the founding values of the EU treaty.
items.body: The EU's top court finds that the reforms breached EU values on a number of levels and broke the founding values of the EU treaty.
items.author: IriLine Desk
